wrong_finding.title: Daily reconcile job at 02:00 Europe/Rome is silently skipped on DST spring-forward

why_wrong: Three errors. (1) Category 'other' is the lazy-classification anti-pattern (see severity_rubric.md Sentinel Anti-pattern C): there is an exact category 'dst-skip' for this. (2) SEV-4 ignores that the job underpins financial reconciliation with a compliance deadline — that is the SEV-2 escalator per BP-022. (3) reproduction_rate_target '<80%-needs-harness' is wrong: DST transition is deterministic given a known date; the bug fires exactly once a year on a predictable day, so the target is 'deterministic'.
